## Source: amazon-inspector (f74fbec503fca2e61a016a70e66269c234d5329e19a1072a7f777c59fc4d466c)
The package @athena-ui-components/deeplink was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (7b29c69193d3e184122eac0cf00f323f2ee4cfd76820f69ddf9c8ff08559b8c5)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@athena-ui-components/deeplink' @ 0.0.42 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
